issues.description: Trigger should be 'Counter' (representing blocking as an interrupting action), not 'OnOpponentBlock'. 'OnOpponentBlock' is not a valid trigger in the OPTCG DSL specification.

Condition 'AnyPlayerHasNoLife' is not valid. Should use 'HasCardOnBoard' with appropriate target, or a custom condition. The text 'if either you or your opponent has 0 Life cards' requires checking life state, which needs proper condition syntax.
